race.description: Aviso Tas Insurance Brokers Mdn Plate
race.comment: WOUNDED EAGLE (7) wasn't really fancied on debut but after settling well off speed found the line strongly and kept winding up to just miss. Looks as though the 1400m is ideal and well worth following up. GOLD TIANNA (1) placed this course and distance fresh then again last time. At top now and deserves a win. Looks a top chance. NORTHERN CHILD (3) was safely held fresh over the six furlongs but fitter and is much better placed by the longer trip. Expecting big improvement. RAIDER'S OWN (4) is going better than form suggests. Close to the winner two back then made late ground this course and distance last time. Change of rider and better gate this time. WALKING STREET (6) was close to the winner latest and cannot be underestimated.
